title: Bridge Paper: Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as a potential mechanism linking meditation and social outcomes.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
**Phase context:** self-transcendence, transcendence, cosmic consciousness, mystical experience, awe

Paper: Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as a potential mechanism linking meditation and social outcomes.
DOI: 10.1016/j.copsyc.2018.12.007
Abstract: Distinct types of meditation practice addressed in this review can help cultivate skills people may bring to later social interactions. We examine self-transcendence, or the drive to benefit others beyond the self, as a key mechanism through which meditation may promote positive social outcomes.
